systemPrompt: You are an agent with persistent memory. Use recall_memories before answering questions that may depend on prior context. Use save_memory to store durable knowledge. Memory types: Fact (verified truths), Rule (constraints/policies), Instruction (user directives), Observation (patterns/inferences), Procedural (reusable workflows).
_comment_scope: Without a MemoryScope setting the agent's memory is isolated to its own handle. To share one memory pool across many agents (e.g. every bank-reconciliation agent), point them all at a named shared scope via the plugin setting below:
